data.description:
## Why
The GitHub Actions UI lists workflows by their `name:` field. Several workflows carry lowercase, non-descriptive `name:` values (test, release, optionality, _optionality, external-integration, verify-identity, terraform-drift, mirror-guard, gerrit-verify) and two use the `.yaml` extension against the ecosystem-standard `.yml`, so the Actions tab is hard to scan and inconsistent. eval.yml has a filename/name mismatch (name: prompt-eval), and eval-plan-review-container.yml is closed-out scaffolding for story da34 (safe-peg-tuner, CLOSED).

## What (naming cleanup ONLY; reusable-workflow refactor is a SEPARATE later change)
Adopt the researched standard used by popular repos + GitHub docs: filenames lowercase-with-hyphens + .yml only; `name:` short Title Case; reusable workflows keep the leading-underscore marker.

- Rewrite `name:` values to descriptive Title Case per the locked table (Gerrit Verified Gate; Release; Optional-Dependency Isolation (reusable)/(mirror); Test Suite (mirror); Verify Authorship Identity; Prompt Eval; Live External Integration; Mirror Guard; PR Lockdown; Terraform Drift; CodeQL SAST).
- Rename files: eval.yml -> prompt-eval.yml; verify-identity.yaml -> verify-identity.yml.
- Delete eval-plan-review-container.yml (da34 closed; opt-in non-blocking, not a required check).
- Update references: src/rebar/llm/eval_specs/README.plan-review.md (eval->prompt-eval, drop container ref); tests/unit/test_verify_opcert_heldout.py + docs/identity.md + docs/adr/0049-opcert-asymmetric.md (.yaml->.yml on verify-identity).

## Locked filenames (NOT renamed)
- gerrit-verify.yaml — Gerrit g2p dispatches by filename substring (verify+gerrit); renaming breaks the Verified vote. Stays the sole .yaml (accepted exception).
- release.yml — PyPI OIDC trusted-publisher subject matches the workflow filename.

## Out of scope (GitHub-managed dynamic workflows, not files): duplicate CodeQL default-setup slot, Dependency Graph, Dependabot Updates, Copilot.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Every workflow has a descriptive Title Case `name:` per the locked table.
- [ ] eval.yml renamed to prompt-eval.yml; verify-identity.yaml renamed to verify-identity.yml; all in-repo references updated.
- [ ] eval-plan-review-container.yml deleted; its README reference removed.
- [ ] gerrit-verify.yaml and release.yml filenames unchanged.
- [ ] make lint passes (actionlint over all workflows) and the workflow-pinning tests pass: test_ci_workflow_parity.py, test_external_canary.py, test_verify_opcert_heldout.py, test_ci_actionlint_scope.py.
- [ ] Lands through Gerrit with LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1.
data.title: GitHub Actions workflow naming cleanup: descriptive name: fields + standardize conventions
